weaknesses: Copyright stuck at 2019 — site appears abandoned/neglected
No online booking/scheduling despite being in business since 1995
Contact form only — no instant estimate or quote tool
Homepage is extremely thin text content — minimal substance for SEO
No service area landing pages (serves entire Denver metro)
No blog or content marketing — zero organic growth strategy
No gallery/portfolio of work — critical for a cleaning service

strengths: Owner email directly on contact page
Multiple service pages (carpet, wood, upholstery, rug, tile)
notes: Family-owned Denver carpet cleaning company since 1995. Site is a basic WordPress template with copyright 2019 — clear neglect signal. No online booking despite 60k+ customers over 27 years. Contact page uses a basic form, no instant quote or automated scheduling. Good reputation but the site is holding them back from lead generation.
